title: Trace T-Echo bridge startup stall
description: Instrument the canonical T-Echo bridge from L2 RX-thread creation through main: ready. Capture thread states, locks/semaphores, initialization calls, UART, and simulator TX timeline at the stall.
acceptance_criteria: A deterministic trace identifies the blocked thread and wait object/function, or provides a minimal experiment distinguishing firmware deadlock from Renode timing/model behavior; commands, hashes, and logs retained.
